name: journalism_classroom_monitoring_millhaven_tru_loy
premise: A Journalism response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving journalism classroom monitoring millhaven tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Mateo Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Mateo Alvarez, accountable for a defensible call in Journalism when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Zara Haddad
agents.identity: I am Zara Haddad, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Journalism.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Mateo Alvarez must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Mateo Alvarez do?
